message:
feat(engine): add 200 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Sixth batch of enrichment tests:

- counterfactual_intervention_planner: 49 tests (optimization passes,
  wave planning, uplift certificates, causal effect estimation)
- cross_repo_contract: 37 tests (schema contracts, boundary contracts,
  structured log verification, version compatibility registry)
- cx_threading: 39 tests (gateway dispatch, policy checks, lifecycle
  transitions, telemetry, budget exhaustion, audit logs)
- declassification_pipeline: 30 tests (loss assessment, policy eval,
  emergency grants, pipeline processing, event progression)
- delegate_cell_harness: 45 tests (cell lifecycle, capability checking,
  invocation recording, replay verification, resource usage)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
